'''radhosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jkt|jkt]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-dh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jkt|jkt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| radhosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rædhesheth|rædhesheth]] || [[word:rædheshej|rædheshej]] || [[word:rædheshesh|rædheshesh]] || [[word:rædheshe|rædheshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:radhodhoshoth|radhodhoshoth]] || [[word:radhodhoshoj|radhodhoshoj]] || [[word:radhodhoshosh|radhodhoshosh]] || [[word:radhodhosho|radhodhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:radhoshoth|radhoshoth]] || [[word:radhoshoj|radhoshoj]] || [[word:radhoshosh|radhoshosh]] || [[word:radhosho|radhosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:radhofshoth|radhofshoth]] || [[word:radhofshoj|radhofshoj]] || [[word:radhofshosh|radhofshosh]] || [[word:radhofshof|radhofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:radhoshotho|radhoshotho]] || [[word:radhoshojo|radhoshojo]] || [[word:radhoshosho|radhoshosho]] || [[word:radhoshoko|radhoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:radhoshoth|radhoshoth]] || [[word:radhoshoj|radhoshoj]] || [[word:radhoshosh|radhoshosh]] || [[word:radhosho|radhosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:radhoshothol|radhoshothol]] || [[word:radhoshojol|radhoshojol]] || [[word:radhoshoshol|radhoshoshol]] || [[word:radhoshokol|radhoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:radhoshothotho|radhoshothotho]] || [[word:radhoshojojo|radhoshojojo]] || [[word:radhoshoshosho|radhoshoshosho]] || [[word:radhoshoko|radhoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:radhoshothon|radhoshothon]] || [[word:radhoshojon|radhoshojon]] || [[word:radhoshoshon|radhoshoshon]] || [[word:radhoshokon|radhoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:radhoshothoro|radhoshothoro]] || [[word:radhoshojoro|radhoshojoro]] || [[word:radhoshoshoro|radhoshoshoro]] || [[word:radhoshokoro|radhoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
